issues.description: Condition missing: must check 'LeaderIsName' with value 'Shirahoshi'. Current condition is 'Always', which makes the leader check ineffective.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Must specify: (1) look at top 5 cards, (2) filter allows EITHER {Neptunian} type OR [Shirahoshi] name, (3) reveal up to 1 card, (4) add to hand. Current DSL only searches by name 'Shirahoshi'.
Missing action: after SearchDeck, must add action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. This is a distinct step not captured.
